nasb.text: Better is a little with the fear of the Lord Than great treasure and turmoil with it.

esv.text: Better is a little with the fear of the Lord than great treasure and trouble with it.

cnv.text: 財物雖少而敬畏耶和華， 勝過財物豐富卻煩惱不安。

ccb.text: 财物虽少但敬畏耶和华， 胜过家财万贯却充满烦恼。

csbs.text: 财物虽少却敬畏耶和华， 好过宝物众多却烦乱不安。
